title: fagraea bodenii
intro: Fagraea bodenii, also known as the 'strangler fig orchid', is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Fagraea bodenii lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Fagraea bodenii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
